problem id: 18602be3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(2)

examples:
  00000111 -> 11011011
  01110100 -> 10001101
  00000001 -> 11110011
  11010010 -> 00100011
  11011011 -> 01001111
  10001000 -> 10011011
  11110011 -> 10101111
  11101011 -> 00001111
  11111100 -> 11101011
  11111111 -> 11111111

query: 10001111
predicted answer: 10111111
